dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)

pi_items.source: Task definition in task.json and verified against task scripts (setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, verifier.py)

NHANES SQL schema: categories table shows root node with id=1, name='Categories', parent=0. Verified in libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz downloaded from https://github.com/LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr/raw/master/sql/nhanes/libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz

privileged_info_summary: LibreHealth EHR uses a nested-set model for document categories. The root category is named 'Categories' (ID=1, parent=0, lft=0, rght=31). The NHANES demo dataset contains 9,375 real patient records and pre-configured document categories including Lab Report, Medical Record, Patient Information, Advance Directive, CCR, CCD, CCDA, and Onsite Portal. The task requires creating a new category 'Telehealth Consent' as a child of the root 'Categories' folder, which will be assigned a new ID (17) in the categories_seq sequence. The nested-set model requires proper lft/rght values for tree integrity.
